✅ Cara Kerja Database Bersama (Multi-Perangkat)

Aplikasi ini menggunakan Google Spreadsheet sebagai database terpusat. Semua perangkat mengakses data yang sama secara real-time melalui Google Apps Script sebagai jembatan.

📋 Langkah Setup (Sekali Saja):
1️⃣ Deploy GAS → 2️⃣ Masukkan URL di bawah → 3️⃣ Klik "Simpan & Test" → 4️⃣ Download File Terkonfigurasi → 5️⃣ Bagikan file tersebut ke semua perangkat
🔑 Kunci Utama: URL GAS harus tertanam di dalam file HTML (bukan di browser). Gunakan tombol "⬇️ Download File HTML Terkonfigurasi" setelah koneksi berhasil, lalu ganti semua file lama dengan file baru tersebut.
Status URL saat ini: ✗ Tidak Terhubung  —  https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyV-5HGz8uKD1oaY78z1...

⚙️ Konfigurasi Google Apps Script

Google Spreadsheet digunakan sebagai satu-satunya database. Anda perlu membuat Google Apps Script sebagai perantara (proxy API).

✅ Koneksi berhasil! Data berhasil disinkronkan.

⚠️ PENTING — Agar URL berlaku di semua perangkat:
URL GAS harus disimpan di dalam file HTML agar otomatis terhubung di semua perangkat (laptop, HP, tablet) tanpa perlu setting ulang.

📌 Ganti semua file index.html lama di semua perangkat dengan file yang didownload ini.
⬇️ Download File HTML Terkonfigurasi
Download file HTML yang sudah tertanam URL GAS-nya. Bagikan ke semua perangkat — langsung terhubung ke database yang sama tanpa setup ulang.

📋 Panduan Setup Google Apps Script

Langkah 1: Buka script.google.com → Proyek Baru.
Langkah 2: Hapus kode default, lalu paste kode GAS di bawah ini.
Langkah 3: Klik ▶️ Run → pilih fungsi initializeSheets → izinkan akses Google Sheets → tunggu selesai (sekali saja).
Langkah 4: Klik Deploy → New Deployment → Web App.
Langkah 5: Atur: Execute as: Me — Who has access: Anyone.
Langkah 6: Klik Deploy → salin URL yang muncul.
Langkah 7: Paste URL di kolom di atas → klik "Simpan & Test Koneksi".
Langkah 8: Jika berhasil → klik "⬇️ Download File HTML Terkonfigurasi" → bagikan ke semua perangkat.
✓ Tersalin! 
// =============================================
// GOOGLE APPS SCRIPT - ExamBrowser Proxy API
// Deploy as Web App:
//   Execute as: Me
//   Who has access: Anyone
// =============================================

const SHEETS_ID = {
  admin:      '1iWX8MNo55oHj0zGgutXKsHOWzD-7m8DkLPeiAcPY8js',
  peserta:    '12aJnnc_b1GRVo8vzuyP42-qfjIjEVLH5SVYyxrp8u3M',
  monitoring: '1segxuGTT5Bb0C96FDfkJmSS0MFp-3e6B4K5ZtEqzYn0',
  template:   '10cJmhJ0ETyWBHqc50Kils7bnJ7M3g-WInP-6nv8i76A',
};

// CORS headers — wajib agar semua perangkat/browser bisa akses
function setCorsHeaders(output) {
  return output
    .setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*')
    .setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS')
    .setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
}

function jsonResponse(data) {
  const output = ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(data))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
  return setCorsHeaders(output);
}

// Router GET — mendukung JSONP agar bisa diakses lintas browser tanpa CORS
function doGet(e) {
  const params = e.parameter || {};
  const action = params.action || '';
  const callback = params.callback || '';
  try {
    const result = handleAction(action, params);
    if (callback) {
      return ContentService.createTextOutput(callback + '(' + JSON.stringify(result) + ')')
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JAVASCRIPT);
    }
    return jsonResponse(result);
  } catch(err) {
    if (callback) {
      return ContentService.createTextOutput(callback + '(' + JSON.stringify({ error: err.toString() }) + ')')
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JAVASCRIPT);
    }
    return jsonResponse({ error: err.toString() });
  }
}

// doPost tidak dipakai dari browser (memicu CORS preflight)
// Semua request dari browser menggunakan doGet via URL params

function handleAction(action, p) {
  if (action === 'ping')             return { ok: true, time: new Date().toISOString() };
  if (action === 'getPeserta')       return getSheetData(SHEETS_ID.peserta, 'Peserta');
  if (action === 'setPeserta')         return setSheetData(SHEETS_ID.peserta, 'Peserta', parseParam(p.data, []));
  if (action === 'appendPesertaRows')  return appendPesertaRows(parseParam(p.data, []));
  if (action === 'getAdmins')        return getSheetData(SHEETS_ID.admin, 'Admin');
  if (action === 'setAdmins')        return setSheetData(SHEETS_ID.admin, 'Admin', parseParam(p.data, []));
  if (action === 'getSoal')          return getSoalData(p.sheetId, p.offset, p.limit, p.jurusan);
  if (action === 'setSoal')          return setSoalData(p.sheetId, parseParam(p.questions, []));
  if (action === 'appendSoalRows')   return appendSoalRows(p.sheetId, parseParam(p.questions, []));
  if (action === 'getConfigs')       return getSheetData(SHEETS_ID.template, 'Konfigurasi');
  if (action === 'setConfig')        return setConfigData(parseParam(p.data, {}));
  if (action === 'getHasil')         return getSheetData(SHEETS_ID.monitoring, 'Hasil');
  if (action === 'appendHasil')      return appendRow(SHEETS_ID.monitoring, 'Hasil', parseParam(p.data, {}));
  if (action === 'appendMonitoring') return appendRow(SHEETS_ID.monitoring, 'Monitoring', parseParam(p.data, {}));
  if (action === 'getSettings')      return getSettings();
  if (action === 'setSettings')      return setSettings(parseParam(p.data, {}));
  if (action === 'deleteHasil')      return deleteRowById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring, 'Hasil', p.id);
  if (action === 'initializeSheets') return initializeSheets();
  if (action === 'saveProgress')     return saveProgress(parseParam(p.data, {}));
  if (action === 'getProgress')      return getProgress(p.nomor, p.mapel);
  if (action === 'clearProgress')    return clearProgress(p.nomor, p.mapel);
  if (action === 'appendAttendance') return appendAttendanceRow(parseParam(p.data, {}));
  if (action === 'getAttendance')    return getAllAttendance();
  if (action === 'deleteAttendance') return deleteAttendanceById(p.id);
  if (action === 'upsertSession')    return upsertSession(parseParam(p.data, {}));
  if (action === 'getAllSessions')   return getAllSessions();
  if (action === 'clearSession')     return clearSession(p.nomor, p.mapel);
  if (action === 'getMonitoring')    return getMonitoringLogs();
  if (action === 'deleteConfig')     return deleteConfigData(p.id);
  if (action === 'clearAllSoal')     return clearAllSoalData(p.mapel);
  if (action === 'setAdminMsg')      return setAdminMsg(parseParam(p.data, {}));
  if (action === 'getAdminMsg')      return getAdminMsg();
  return { error: 'Unknown action: ' + action };
}


// ===== APPEND PESERTA ROWS (untuk chunked upload) =====
function appendPesertaRows(rows) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.peserta);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Peserta');
    if (!sheet) return { error: 'Sheet Peserta tidak ditemukan' };
    for (const row of rows) {
      sheet.appendRow(Array.isArray(row) ? row : [row]);
    }
    return { ok: true, appended: rows.length };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

// ===== APPEND SOAL ROWS — PERBAIKAN: batch setValues, bukan loop appendRow =====
// Mendukung soal > 100 nomor tanpa timeout GAS
function appendSoalRows(sheetId, questions) {
  try {
    if (!sheetId) return { error: 'sheetId tidak ditemukan' };
    if (!questions || questions.length === 0) return { ok: true, appended: 0 };
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Soal') || ss.getSheets()[0];
    if (!sheet) return { error: 'Sheet Soal tidak ditemukan' };
    // PERBAIKAN: 1 operasi setValues batch jauh lebih cepat dari loop appendRow
    const rows = questions.map(function(q) {
      return [
        q.id, q.type, q.text,
        (q.options && q.options[0] != null) ? String(q.options[0]) : '',
        (q.options && q.options[1] != null) ? String(q.options[1]) : '',
        (q.options && q.options[2] != null) ? String(q.options[2]) : '',
        (q.options && q.options[3] != null) ? String(q.options[3]) : '',
        (q.options && q.options[4] != null) ? String(q.options[4]) : '',
        Array.isArray(q.answer) ? q.answer.join(',') : (q.answer !== undefined ? String(q.answer) : ''),
        q.premises ? q.premises.join('|') : '',
        q.choices  ? q.choices.join('|')  : '',
        q.image    ? String(q.image)       : '',
        q.jurusan  ? String(q.jurusan)     : ''
      ];
    });
    const lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    sheet.getRange(lastRow + 1, 1, rows.length, 13).setValues(rows);
    return { ok: true, appended: questions.length };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

// ===== LOG PELANGGARAN (Monitoring) =====
function getMonitoringLogs() {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Monitoring');
    if (!sheet) return { data: [] };
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    if (rows.length <= 1) return { data: rows };
    return { data: rows };
  } catch(e) { return { data: [], error: e.toString() }; }
}

// ===== PROGRESS UJIAN (multi-perangkat) =====
function saveProgress(data) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Progress');
    if (!sheet) {
      sheet = ss.insertSheet('Progress');
      sheet.appendRow(['Nomor','Mapel','Answers','TimeLeft','CurrentQ','UpdatedAt']);
    }
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const key = String(data.nomor) + '|' + String(data.mapel);
    let foundRow = -1;
    for (let i = 1; i < rows.length; i++) {
      if (String(rows[i][0]) + '|' + String(rows[i][1]) === key) { foundRow = i + 1; break; }
    }
    const row = [data.nomor, data.mapel, JSON.stringify(data.answers||{}), data.timeLeft||0, data.currentQ||0, new Date().toISOString()];
    if (foundRow > 0) {
      sheet.getRange(foundRow, 1, 1, 6).setValues([row]);
    } else {
      sheet.appendRow(row);
    }
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function getProgress(nomor, mapel) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Progress');
    if (!sheet) return { data: null };
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const key = String(nomor) + '|' + String(mapel);
    for (let i = 1; i < rows.length; i++) {
      if (String(rows[i][0]) + '|' + String(rows[i][1]) === key) {
        return { data: { nomor: rows[i][0], mapel: rows[i][1], answers: rows[i][2], timeLeft: rows[i][3], currentQ: rows[i][4], updatedAt: rows[i][5] } };
      }
    }
    return { data: null };
  } catch(e) { return { data: null, error: e.toString() }; }
}

function clearProgress(nomor, mapel) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Progress');
    if (!sheet) return { ok: true };
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const key = String(nomor) + '|' + String(mapel);
    for (let i = rows.length - 1; i >= 1; i--) {
      if (String(rows[i][0]) + '|' + String(rows[i][1]) === key) { sheet.deleteRow(i + 1); return { ok: true }; }
    }
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

// ===== DAFTAR HADIR (Attendance) =====
function appendAttendanceRow(data) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName('DaftarHadir');
    if (!sheet) {
      sheet = ss.insertSheet('DaftarHadir');
      sheet.appendRow(['ID','Datetime','Waktu','Nomor','Nama','Kelas','Jurusan','Mapel','Keterangan','Catatan']);
    }
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const key = String(data.nomor) + '|' + String(data.mapel);
    for (let i = 1; i < rows.length; i++) {
      if (String(rows[i][3]) + '|' + String(rows[i][7]) === key) {
        return { ok: true, skipped: true };
      }
    }
    sheet.appendRow([data.id, data.datetime, data.waktu||'', data.nomor, data.nama, data.kelas, data.jurusan, data.mapel, data.keterangan||'Hadir', data.catatan||'']);
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function getAllAttendance() {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('DaftarHadir');
    if (!sheet) return { data: [] };
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    if (rows.length <= 1) return { data: [] };
    const data = rows.slice(1).filter(r => r[0]).map(r => ({
      id: String(r[0]||''), datetime: String(r[1]||''), waktu: String(r[2]||''),
      nomor: String(r[3]||''), nama: String(r[4]||''), kelas: String(r[5]||''),
      jurusan: String(r[6]||''), mapel: String(r[7]||''),
      keterangan: String(r[8]||'Hadir'), catatan: String(r[9]||'')
    }));
    return { data };
  } catch(e) { return { data: [], error: e.toString() }; }
}

// ===== HAPUS DAFTAR HADIR BY ID =====
function deleteAttendanceById(id) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('DaftarHadir');
    if (!sheet) return { error: 'Sheet DaftarHadir tidak ditemukan' };
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for (let i = rows.length - 1; i >= 1; i--) {
      if (String(rows[i][0]) === String(id)) {
        sheet.deleteRow(i + 1);
        return { ok: true };
      }
    }
    return { error: 'Row tidak ditemukan untuk ID: ' + id };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

// ===== SESI PESERTA (Sessions) =====
function upsertSession(data) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Sessions');
    if (!sheet) {
      sheet = ss.insertSheet('Sessions');
      sheet.appendRow(['Nomor','Mapel','Nama','Kelas','Jurusan','Status','Progress','LoginTime','Token','Anomalies','TimerEndTime','UpdatedAt']);
    }
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const key = String(data.nomor) + '|' + String(data.mapel);
    let foundRow = -1;
    for (let i = 1; i < rows.length; i++) {
      if (String(rows[i][0]) + '|' + String(rows[i][1]) === key) { foundRow = i + 1; break; }
    }
    const row = [
      data.nomor, data.mapel, data.nama, data.kelas, data.jurusan,
      data.status, data.progress || 0, data.loginTime || '',
      data.token || '', JSON.stringify(data.anomalies || []),
      data.timerEndTime || '', new Date().toISOString()
    ];
    if (foundRow > 0) {
      sheet.getRange(foundRow, 1, 1, row.length).setValues([row]);
    } else {
      sheet.appendRow(row);
    }
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function getAllSessions() {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Sessions');
    if (!sheet) return { data: [] };
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    if (rows.length <= 1) return { data: [] };
    const data = rows.slice(1).filter(r => r[0]).map(r => ({
      nomor: String(r[0]||''), mapel: String(r[1]||''), nama: String(r[2]||''),
      kelas: String(r[3]||''), jurusan: String(r[4]||''), status: String(r[5]||'login'),
      progress: Number(r[6]||0), loginTime: String(r[7]||''), token: String(r[8]||''),
      anomalies: (() => { try { return JSON.parse(r[9]||'[]'); } catch(_) { return []; } })(),
      timerEndTime: r[10] ? Number(r[10]) : null, updatedAt: String(r[11]||'')
    }));
    return { data };
  } catch(e) { return { data: [], error: e.toString() }; }
}

function clearSession(nomor, mapel) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Sessions');
    if (!sheet) return { ok: true };
    const rows = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const key = String(nomor) + '|' + String(mapel);
    for (let i = rows.length - 1; i >= 1; i--) {
      if (String(rows[i][0]) + '|' + String(rows[i][1]) === key) { sheet.deleteRow(i + 1); return { ok: true }; }
    }
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function parseParam(val, fallback) {
  if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return fallback;
  if (typeof val === 'object') return val;
  try { return JSON.parse(val); } catch(_) { return fallback; }
}

function getSheetData(sheetId, sheetName) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName(sheetName) || ss.getSheets()[0];
    if (!sheet) return { data: [] };
    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    return { data };
  } catch(e) { return { data: [], error: e.toString() }; }
}

function setSheetData(sheetId, sheetName, rows) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName(sheetName);
    if (!sheet) sheet = ss.insertSheet(sheetName);
    sheet.clearContents();
    if (rows && rows.length > 0) {
      const data = rows.map(r => Array.isArray(r) ? r : Object.values(r));
      sheet.getRange(1, 1, data.length, data[0].length).setValues(data);
    }
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function appendRow(sheetId, sheetName, rowObj) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName(sheetName);
    if (!sheet) sheet = ss.insertSheet(sheetName);
    const row = Object.values(rowObj).map(v => typeof v === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(v) : v);
    sheet.appendRow(row);
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function deleteRowById(sheetId, sheetName, id) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName(sheetName);
    if (!sheet) return { error: 'Sheet tidak ditemukan' };
    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for (let i = data.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      if (String(data[i][0]) === String(id)) { sheet.deleteRow(i + 1); return { ok: true }; }
    }
    return { error: 'Row tidak ditemukan' };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}


// PERBAIKAN: getSoalData mendukung paginasi offset/limit agar soal >60
// tidak terpotong karena batas payload GAS response.
// Jika offset/limit tidak dikirim, kembalikan semua baris (perilaku lama).
function getSoalData(sheetId, offsetParam, limitParam, jurusanParam) {
  try {
    var ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    var sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Soal') || ss.getSheets()[0];
    if (!sheet) return { data: [] };
    var allData = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    var header   = allData.slice(0, 1);
    var dataRows = allData.slice(1);
    // Filter berdasarkan jurusan jika disediakan (kolom ke-13, index 12)
    if (jurusanParam && jurusanParam.trim() !== '') {
      var jur = jurusanParam.trim().toLowerCase();
      dataRows = dataRows.filter(function(row) {
        var cellJurusan = String(row[12] || '').trim();
        if (!cellJurusan) return false; // soal tanpa label jurusan tidak lolos jika filter aktif
        var list = cellJurusan.toLowerCase().split(',').map(function(s){ return s.trim(); });
        return list.includes(jur);
      });
    }
    if (!offsetParam && !limitParam) return { data: header.concat(dataRows), total: dataRows.length };
    var offset   = parseInt(offsetParam) || 0;
    var limit    = parseInt(limitParam)  || dataRows.length;
    var page     = dataRows.slice(offset, offset + limit);
    return { data: header.concat(page), total: dataRows.length };
  } catch(e) { return { data: [], error: e.toString() }; }
}

function setSoalData(sheetId, questions) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Soal') || ss.getSheets()[0];
    sheet.clearContents();
    const header = ['Nomor','Tipe','Pertanyaan','Opsi A','Opsi B','Opsi C','Opsi D','Opsi E','Jawaban','Premises','Choices','ImageURL','Jurusan'];
    const rows = [header];
    questions.forEach((q, i) => {
      rows.push([
        i+1, q.type, q.text,
        (q.options && q.options[0]) != null ? String(q.options[0]) : '', (q.options && q.options[1]) != null ? String(q.options[1]) : '', (q.options && q.options[2]) != null ? String(q.options[2]) : '', (q.options && q.options[3]) != null ? String(q.options[3]) : '', (q.options && q.options[4]) != null ? String(q.options[4]) : '',
        Array.isArray(q.answer) ? q.answer.join(',') : (q.answer !== undefined ? q.answer : ''),
        q.premises ? q.premises.join('|') : '',
        q.choices ? q.choices.join('|') : '',
        q.image || '',
        q.jurusan || ''
      ]);
    });
    sheet.getRange(1, 1, rows.length, rows[0].length).setValues(rows);
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function setConfigData(cfg) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.template);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Konfigurasi');
    if (!sheet) { sheet = ss.insertSheet('Konfigurasi'); sheet.appendRow(['ID','Kelas','Jurusan','Mapel','Token','Durasi']); }
    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const row = [cfg.id, cfg.kelas, cfg.jurusan, cfg.mapel, cfg.token, cfg.duration || 90];
    let rowIdx = -1;
    for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (String(data[i][0]) === String(cfg.id)) { rowIdx = i + 1; break; }
    }
    if (rowIdx > 0) {
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 1, 1, row.length).setValues([row]);
    } else {
      if (data.length === 0) sheet.appendRow(['ID','Kelas','Jurusan','Mapel','Token','Durasi']);
      sheet.appendRow(row);
    }
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function deleteConfigData(id) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.template);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Konfigurasi');
    if (!sheet) return { ok: true };
    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    for (let i = data.length - 1; i >= 1; i--) {
      if (String(data[i][0]) === String(id)) { sheet.deleteRow(i + 1); return { ok: true }; }
    }
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function clearAllSoalData(mapel) {
  try {
    const sheetId = SHEETS_ID.mapel ? SHEETS_ID.mapel[mapel] : null;
    if (!sheetId) return { error: 'Sheet ID untuk mapel "' + mapel + '" tidak ditemukan' };
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Soal') || ss.getSheets()[0];
    if (!sheet) return { error: 'Sheet Soal tidak ditemukan' };
    const lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow > 1) sheet.deleteRows(2, lastRow - 1);
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

// ===== PESAN ADMIN — client-side (localStorage fallback) =====
function setAdminMsg(data) {
  try {
    localStorage.setItem('adminMessages', JSON.stringify(data.messages || []));
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function getAdminMsg() {
  try {
    var msgs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('adminMessages') || '[]');
    return { messages: msgs };
  } catch(e) { return { messages: [] }; }
}

function getSettings() {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.admin);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Settings');
    if (!sheet) return { data: {} };
    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const settings = {};
    data.forEach(row => { if (row[0]) settings[row[0]] = row[1]; });
    return { data: settings };
  } catch(e) { return { data: {} }; }
}

function setSettings(settings) {
  try {
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.admin);
    let sheet = ss.getSheetByName('Settings');
    if (!sheet) sheet = ss.insertSheet('Settings');
    sheet.clearContents();
    const rows = Object.entries(settings).map(([k, v]) => [k, v]);
    if (rows.length > 0) sheet.getRange(1, 1, rows.length, 2).setValues(rows);
    return { ok: true };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

// Jalankan fungsi ini SEKALI sebelum deploy untuk membuat semua sheet
function initializeSheets() {
  try {
    const ssAdmin = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.admin);
    ensureSheet(ssAdmin, 'Admin', ['ID','Nama','Username','Password','IsMain']);
    ensureSheet(ssAdmin, 'Settings', ['Key','Value']);

    const ssPeserta = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.peserta);
    ensureSheet(ssPeserta, 'Peserta', ['Nomor Peserta','Nama','Kelas','Jurusan']);

    const ssMonit = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.monitoring);
    ensureSheet(ssMonit, 'Hasil', ['ID','Datetime','Nomor','Nama','Kelas','Jurusan','Mapel','Nilai','Durasi','Jawaban','TotalBenar','TotalBobot','HasManual','Waktu']);
    ensureSheet(ssMonit, 'Monitoring', ['ID','Datetime','Nomor','Nama','Tipe','Detail']);
    ensureSheet(ssMonit, 'Progress', ['Nomor','Mapel','Answers','TimeLeft','CurrentQ','UpdatedAt']);
    ensureSheet(ssMonit, 'Sessions', ['Nomor','Mapel','Nama','Kelas','Jurusan','Status','Progress','LoginTime','Token','Anomalies','TimerEndTime','UpdatedAt']);
    ensureSheet(ssMonit, 'DaftarHadir', ['ID','Datetime','Waktu','Nomor','Nama','Kelas','Jurusan','Mapel','Keterangan','Catatan']);

    const ssTemplate = SpreadsheetApp.openById(SHEETS_ID.template);
    ensureSheet(ssTemplate, 'Konfigurasi', ['ID','Kelas','Jurusan','Mata Pelajaran','Token','Durasi(menit)']);

    return { ok: true, message: 'Semua sheet berhasil diinisialisasi!' };
  } catch(e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
}

function ensureSheet(ss, name, headers) {
  let sheet = ss.getSheetByName(name);
  if (!sheet) {
    sheet = ss.insertSheet(name);
    sheet.appendRow(headers);
  }
  return sheet;
}

🗄️ Format Data Spreadsheet

Berikut adalah format kolom yang harus ada di setiap spreadsheet:

Sheet: Peserta (DB peserta)

Kolom: Nomor Peserta | Nama | Kelas | Jurusan

Sheet: Admin (DB admin)

Kolom: ID | Nama | Username | Password | IsMain (true/false)

Sheet: Soal Mapel (misal DB mapel AKL)

Kolom: Nomor | Tipe | Pertanyaan | Opsi A-E | Jawaban | Premises | Choices | ImageURL | Jurusan (opsional, pisah koma jika lebih dari 1)

Sheet: Konfigurasi (Sheet 2 di DB template)

Kolom: ID | Kelas | Jurusan | Mata Pelajaran | Token | Durasi(menit)

Sheet: Hasil (DB monitoring)

Kolom: ID | Datetime | Nomor | Nama | Kelas | Jurusan | Mapel | Nilai | Durasi | Jawaban(JSON) | TotalBenar | TotalBobot | HasManual | Waktu
